Welcome to SOLASTA

"Some nights are simply events. Others become memories that stay with us forever."

With immense pride and excitement, the BDS 11th Batch warmly welcomes every senior, junior, and friend to SOLASTA — our annual celebration of music, friendship, and unforgettable memories.

As we welcome our newest batch and bid farewell to our beloved seniors, we invite you to celebrate a night filled with joy, laughter, dancing, and togetherness.

Prepare yourself for electrifying music, exciting games, delicious complimentary food, refreshing drinks, and the much-awaited Mr & Miss Freshers competition. Every smile, every dance, and every conversation will become a memory you'll cherish long after the night is over.

SOLASTA is more than just a dance party — it's a celebration of friendship, unity, and the unforgettable journey we share as one BDS family.

The lights are ready.
The music is waiting.
The stage is set.
All that's missing is you.

Join the Celebration

Special Message to 15th Batch

You've made it through entrance exams, orientation week, and your first taste of med-school life — now it's time to celebrate, properly.

We remember exactly what it felt like to be new here, and we can't wait to welcome you the way we wish we'd been welcomed: with music, laughter, games, and a whole lot of energy. Come dressed to impress, bring your best moves, and get ready for a night you'll be talking about for the next five years.

With love,
11th Batch, BDS
KUSMS, Dhulikhel

What's In Store

A night packed with everything fun

🎮

Games & Ice-Breakers

Fun challenges to get everyone mixing, mingling, and laughing together.

🎵

Music Night & Dance

DJ beats and a dance floor that stays packed till late.

👑

Mr & Miss Freshers

UG and PG's most charismatic freshers, crowned on stage. Could it be you?

🥂

Drinks & Chill

Kick back and vibe with your seniors in a relaxed party atmosphere.

🍽️

Food & Feast

A delicious spread to keep the energy — and the dancing — going all night.

💌

Confession Booth

Say what you've always wanted to, anonymously. Secrets, shoutouts, and crushes welcome.

...plus a few more surprises we're saving for the night itself ✨

Memories

Moments from our nights

The Venue

Heritage Home Dhulikhel

Tucked into Dhulikhel's Saraswati Bazaar, just a short walk from town, Heritage Home wraps a garden courtyard and panoramic Himalayan views around a warm, homegrown charm — the perfect backdrop for a night to remember.

📍 Get Directions

Getting There

Bus Routes

We've arranged a free pickup and drop-off bus. Hop on at any stop along the way.

1 Route 1

🚌
  • North Pole
  • Hospital Chowk
  • Dhulikhel Chowk
  • Saraswoti Bazar
  • Heritage Home

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

We know! That's exactly why we're giving you one unforgettable evening to unwind before exam season begins. Dance, laugh, make memories, and then get back to your books with renewed energy. Balance is everything!

We really hope you come to the party. It's a part of our academic journey. It's a tradition of our Dental Family and we really hope you to be a part of this tradition. ❤️❤️

We know Rs 1000 can be much, but we also have to manage a lot with that. We are giving you food, setting up the venue, hiring a DJ, decorating the event, and much more with that. We really want to give you the experience of a lifetime and won't make you feel as if you have wasted your money.

No, there isn't a strict dress code. You can wear whatever is comfortable.

We care about all our family. So we have coordinated with the police department for security, and we will pick up and drop off with a hired bus at night. If still concerned, a representative of our batch will accompany you until you reach your home safely.

Yes! Complimentary food will be provided for all registered attendees.

We will conduct an interview for fair selection. Please stay updated on the instructions announced by the organizing team.
